channel: # Run these to source rows for sdr-hiring-decision-makers-list.csv. Qualify every hit against the ICP (>=50 employees AND >=$50M revenue) before enriching in Landbase.

query_or_filter: ("VP Sales" OR "Head of Sales" OR "Director of Sales" OR CRO OR "Chief Revenue Officer" OR "VP Revenue" OR "Head of Sales Development") NOT (SDR OR BDR OR Intern OR "Account Executive")
what_it_finds: Senior sales leaders excluding ICs and the SDRs themselves

query_or_filter: Company headcount = 51-200 / 201-500 / 501-1000 + ... + Posted on LinkedIn in past 30 days
notes: Stack with headcount to enforce the >=50 employee rule

query_or_filter: Company hiring on LinkedIn = true  (then filter company jobs to SDR/BDR/Sales Development)
what_it_finds: Companies expanding the SDR function right now

query_or_filter: booked meetings  |  pipeline is dry  |  outbound isn't working  |  ramping SDRs  |  scaling our SDR team
what_it_finds: Low-visibility posts voicing the exact pain
notes: Map the poster -> their company -> qualify ICP

query_or_filter: Job title: "SDR" OR "BDR" OR "Sales Development Representative" ; Company size 51+
notes: Each posting company is a target account

query_or_filter: Search public boards for SDR / BDR / Sales Development openings
notes: Often lists hiring-manager name -> the decision-maker

query_or_filter: hiring SDR  |  can't book meetings  |  pipeline dry  |  SDR ramp  |  agency vs in-house SDR
what_it_finds: Sales leaders venting the pain in detail

query_or_filter: outbound not working  |  need more meetings  |  should I hire an SDR
what_it_finds: Founders/VPs of SaaS cos describing pipeline gaps

query_or_filter: hired SDRs  |  fill the calendar  |  lead gen agency
sales pipeline  |  cold outbound  |  first SDR hire
SDR capacity  |  meeting conversion  |  outbound stack
Import qualified accounts/contacts -> enrich work_email + direct_phone -> verify
column7: Only legitimate path to 'all contact info'
